title: Testcase Patch
description: A minimal UVM testcase or sequence patch generated to close a coverage gap.

coverage_type.description: Coverage type of the target gap.

new_files.description: List of new file paths to be created.

modified_files.description: List of existing file paths to be modified (should be empty in MVP).

compile_command.description: Command to compile the new test.

run_command.description: Command to run the new test.

coverage_target.description: Coverage targets this patch aims to close. Format depends on coverage_type: 'covergroup.coverpoint.bin' for functional; 'source_file:line' for line; 'module.signal[toggle_dir]' for toggle; 'module.fsm_name.state' for fsm; etc.

review_checklist.description: Items the engineer should verify before merging.
